prompt: For a protein engineering research program, develop a specific protein binder targeting Genome polyprotein (contains prM/E, NS3 helicase/protease, NS5 RdRp) (flavivirus polyprotein (E glycoprotein, NS3 protease/helicase)) expressed by Yellow fever virus. The binder should achieve low-nanomolar Kd. outline a methodology for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using ESMFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Genome polyprotein (contains prM/E, NS3 helicase/protease, NS5 RdRp); organism: Yellow fever virus; catalogue version v1.0
